art_market.summary: Seoul's 2026 art scene remains highly dynamic in late March with major institutional shows and new market initiatives.
key_events: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center: Examining LGBTQ+ practices in Seoul's cultural context (opened March 20, 2026).
Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul: Major career survey focusing on themes of life, death, and human desire.
New digital art initiative '20!2026 Art Seoul' launched (March 16) with an 80% buyback guarantee to lower entry barriers.
March Avery: Form into Color at Esther Schipper (March 3 - April 25, 2026).
art_market.outlook: Ongoing momentum with major museum openings and innovative digital platforms focused on market accessibility.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed Friday, March 20 at 5,781.2 (+0.31%), buoyed by hopes regarding the Iran conflict resolution.

key_indicators.Market_Sentiment: Cautiously optimistic; volatility remains as investors watch geopolitical developments.
key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Hopes for earlier-than-expected resolution of Iran conflict; semiconductor cycle performance.
key_indicators.Outlook: Market focus remains on geopolitical stability and economic sensitivity to energy prices.
